full_text:
Chong Ji 种輯
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chong Ji (种輯). Served Han as Changshui Commandant. Friend of Dong Cheng. Executed by Cao Cao. Chong Ji was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Chong Ji lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
